hooks.command: if [ -n "$CLAUDE_FILE" ] && echo "$CLAUDE_FILE" | grep -qE '(Cargo\.lock|bun\.lock)$'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not edit lock files directly'; exit 2; fi
if [ -n "$CLAUDE_FILE" ] && echo "$CLAUDE_FILE" | grep -q '.review-passed'; then echo 'BLOCK: Do not modify the review lock file directly'; exit 2; fi

if echo "$CLAUDE_BASH_COMMAND" | grep -qF '.review-passed' && echo "$CLAUDE_BASH_COMMAND" | grep -qE '(rm|mv|unlink|truncate) ' && echo "$CLAUDE_BASH_COMMAND" | grep -qE '\.review-passed[^[:space:]]*[[:space:]]+[^[:space:]]'; then echo 'BLOCK: Cannot remove .review-passed directly — only gh pr create can consume it'; exit 2; fi
if [ -f .claude/.review-passed ]; then rm -f .claude/.review-passed; exit 0; else echo 'BLOCK: Run /roca-review before creating a PR. All checks must pass first.'; exit 2; fi
